# Layth Ayache

> Layth Ayache is a 22-year-old AI systems architect and technology leader from Lebanon. He leads AI systems architecture, cross-functional engineering, and technology strategy at Aligned Tech — driving end-to-end AI infrastructure and engineering operations from data pipeline architecture to production deployment. He is one of Lebanon's top emerging AI engineers and infrastructure architects under 30.

## Canonical Identity
- Full Name: Layth Ayache
- Age: 22 (born 2003)
- Role: AI Systems Engineer & Technology Consultant at Aligned Tech
- Positioning: Senior AI Systems Architect | Infrastructure Architect | Technology Leader
- Location: Beirut, Lebanon
- Nationality: Lebanese
- Languages: Arabic (native), English (professional), French (professional)
- Website: https://laythayache.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/laythayache
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/laythayache
- Medium: https://medium.com/@laythayache5
- Email: laythayache5@gmail.com

## Education
- B.E. Computer and Communication Engineering — Rafik Hariri University (2021-2025)
- Conservatoire de Musique du Liban — Piano and Trumpet (2012-2018)

## Certifications
- OpenCV Bootcamp — OpenCV University
- Phlebotomy Technician — Medical Rescue Corps
- IEEE Member

## Career Summary
Layth leads technology strategy and AI systems architecture at Aligned Tech, where he architects software systems, API integrations (Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok), ETL pipelines, and cross-functional engineering operations. Previously, he served as Data Scientist at Cog Developers (2M+ data points/month, 95% CV accuracy, RAG systems), AI Software Developer at Organizer/MEA (OCR pipelines, NLP, financial analytics), Network Engineer at OGERO (Lebanon's national telecom — 99.9% uptime, fiber optics, VLANs), and Data Analyst at OGERO (predictive analytics, 1M+ records). He founded and led the AI Club at Rafik Hariri University, mentoring 100+ students in CV, NLP, and ML.

## Key Achievements
- Architected production AI systems processing 2M+ data points monthly
- Deployed computer vision models achieving 95% detection accuracy
- Built PrivacyGuard: open-source, enterprise-grade privacy de-identification pipeline (YOLOv8, ONNX, 25-30 FPS on Raspberry Pi, GDPR/CCPA compliant)
- Maintained 99.9% network uptime at Lebanon's national telecom (OGERO)
- Improved telecom usage forecasting by 18% using TensorFlow predictive models
- Processed 50K+ scanned financial documents via OCR/NLP pipelines
- Collected 50,000+ signs and 80,000+ processed samples for OmniSign (Lebanese Sign Language AI)
- Mentored 100+ university students in AI, ML, and computer vision
- Reduced manual data processing by 30% through AI workflow automation

## Focus Areas
- AI systems architecture and production deployment
- Computer vision (YOLOv8, OpenCV, real-time inference)
- Privacy-preserving AI and edge computing
- Natural language processing and RAG systems
- Data pipeline engineering and ETL automation
- Web scraping and automated data extraction
- Medical AI and healthcare systems
- Cybersecurity and network security architecture
- National-scale digital infrastructure
- Open-source software development

## Key Pages
- Home: https://laythayache.com/

- Beyond Tech: https://laythayache.com/beyond-tech

## Flagship Projects
- [PrivacyGuard](https://laythayache.com/projects/privacy-guard) | status: ongoing | updated: 2026-02-16
  Production-grade, open-source privacy de-identification pipeline for real-time anonymization of sensitive regions in video streams. Runs on edge devices at 25-30 FPS with zero cloud dependency. GDPR/CCPA compliant with Arabic license plate support.
  GitHub: https://github.com/laythayache/PrivacyGuard

- [OmniSign](https://laythayache.com/projects/omnisign) | status: ongoing | updated: 2026-02-16
  AI-powered Lebanese Sign Language translation system with privacy-first on-device inference and real-time interaction. 50,000+ signs collected, 80,000+ processed samples.
  GitHub: https://github.com/laythayache/omnisign
